Literal.Value: '{"$schema":"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json","width":"container","height":400,"data":{"name":"dataset"},"transform":[{"fold":["Total Gross Sales","Discount Amount","Total Cost-to-Serve","Estimated SLA Penalty","Retailer Rebate Accrual","True Net Profit (Post-Rebate)"],"as":["key","Amount"]},{"calculate":"datum.key == ''Total Gross Sales'' ? ''Gross Revenue'' : datum.key == ''Discount Amount'' ? ''Less Discounts'' : datum.key == ''Total Cost-to-Serve'' ? ''Less CTS'' : datum.key == ''Estimated SLA Penalty'' ? ''Less SLA Penalties'' : datum.key == ''Retailer Rebate Accrual'' ? ''Less Rebates'' : ''True Net Profit''","as":"FinancialBucket"},{"calculate":"datum.key == ''Total Gross Sales'' || datum.key == ''True Net Profit (Post-Rebate)'' ? ''Total'' : ''Outflow''","as":"Type"},{"calculate":"datum.key == ''Total Gross Sales'' ? ''Inflow'' : datum.key == ''True Net Profit (Post-Rebate)'' ? ''Total'' : ''Outflow''","as":"Direction"},{"calculate":"datum.Type == ''Outflow'' ? -Math.abs(datum.Amount) : datum.Amount","as":"SignedAmount"},{"window":[{"op":"sum","field":"SignedAmount","as":"RunningTotal"}],"frame":[null,0]},{"calculate":"datum.Type == ''Total'' ? 0 : datum.RunningTotal - datum.SignedAmount","as":"BarBase"},{"calculate":"datum.RunningTotal","as":"BarTop"},{"calculate":"[''Gross Revenue'',''Less Discounts'',''Less CTS'',''Less SLA Penalties'',''Less Rebates'',''True Net Profit''].indexOf(datum.FinancialBucket)","as":"SortOrder"}],"encoding":{"x":{"field":"FinancialBucket","type":"nominal","sort":{"field":"SortOrder","order":"ascending"},"axis":{"title":null,"labelAngle":-15,"labelFont":"Segoe UI","labelFontSize":10,"grid":false}}},"layer":[{"mark":{"type":"bar","size":32,"cornerRadius":2},"encoding":{"y":{"field":"BarBase","type":"quantitative","axis":{"title":"AUD ($)","gridDash":[4,4],"format":"$,.0s","labelFont":"Segoe UI","labelFontSize":10}},"y2":{"field":"BarTop"},"fill":{"field":"Direction","type":"nominal","scale":{"domain":["Inflow","Outflow","Total"],"range":["#10B981","#EF4444","#374151"]},"legend":null}}},{"mark":{"type":"text","dy":-8,"font":"Segoe UI","fontWeight":"bold","fontSize":10},"encoding":{"y":{"field":"BarTop","type":"quantitative"},"text":{"field":"Amount","type":"quantitative","format":"$,.0f"}}}]}'
